title: Simpliglottis valida
intro: Simpliglottis valida, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
